description: The OpenAlex API provides access to a comprehensive catalog of scholarly works, authors, sources, institutions, topics, keywords, publishers, and funders. OpenAlex indexes over 250 million scholarly works.

tools.name: authors_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single author by OpenAlex ID or ORCID. Required: id. Returns the Author.

params.name: id
params.description: OpenAlex ID (e.g., A5023888391) or ORCID

tools.name: authors_list
tools.description: Get a list of authors with optional filtering, searching, sorting, and pagination. Optional: filter, sort, group_by (plus 5 more). Returns the AuthorsListResponse.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter authors. Examples: `has_orcid:true`, `last_known_institutions.id:I27837315`, `works_count:>100`, `affiliations.institution.country_code:US` See [all Author fields](/api-reference/authors#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort by: `works_count`, `cited_by_count`, `summary_stats.h_index`, `summary_stats.i10_index`. Prefix with `-` for descending. See [all Author fields](/api-reference/authors#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: group_by
params.description: Group by: `last_known_institutions.country_code`, `last_known_institutions.type`, `has_orcid` See [all Author fields](/api-reference/authors#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: search
params.description: Full-text search across titles, abstracts, and other text fields.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (1-100, default 25)

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Use cursor for deep pagination beyond 10,000 results.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor for deep pagination. Use `cursor=*` to start, then use the `next_cursor` from the response.

params.name: sample
params.description: Return a random sample of N results (max 10,000). Cannot be used with sort or page.

tools.name: autocomplete_autocomplete
tools.description: Fast typeahead search returning up to 10 results. Use for search-as-you-type interfaces. Required: entity_type (default: works), q. Optional: filter. Returns the AutocompleteResponse.

params.name: entity_type
params.description: Type of entity to search

params.name: q
params.description: Search query string

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter results using field:value syntax. Multiple filters can be combined with commas (AND) or pipes (OR). Available fields vary by entity type.

tools.name: awards_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single award by its OpenAlex ID. Required: id. Returns the AwardFull.

params.name: id
params.description: OpenAlex ID (e.g., G5859020988)

tools.name: awards_list
tools.description: Get a list of research grants and funding awards. Optional: filter, sort, group_by (plus 5 more). Returns the AwardsListResponse.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter awards. Examples: `funder.id:F4320306076`, `start_year:2023`, `funded_outputs_count:>10` See [all Award fields](/api-reference/awards#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort by: `funded_outputs_count`, `amount`, `start_year`. Prefix with `-` for descending. See [all Award fields](/api-reference/awards#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: group_by
params.description: Group by: `funder.id`, `start_year`, `currency` See [all Award fields](/api-reference/awards#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: search
params.description: Full-text search across titles, abstracts, and other text fields.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (1-100, default 25)

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Use cursor for deep pagination beyond 10,000 results.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor for deep pagination. Use `cursor=*` to start, then use the `next_cursor` from the response.

params.name: sample
params.description: Return a random sample of N results (max 10,000). Cannot be used with sort or page.

tools.name: changefiles_get
tools.description: Get details for a specific date's changefile, including which entity types changed, how many records, and download links in JSONL and Parquet formats. For a full guide on using changefiles to keep your local data current, see [Download Changefiles](/download/changefiles). **Requires a paid plan** — contact sales@openalex.org or see [pricing](https://openalex.org/pricing). Required: date. Returns the ChangefilesGetResponse.

params.name: date
params.description: The changefile date in YYYY-MM-DD format

tools.name: changefiles_list
tools.description: List all available changefile dates. Each date has downloadable files containing every entity record that was created or modified on that day. For a full guide on using changefiles to keep your local data current, see [Download Changefiles](/download/changefiles). **Requires a paid plan** — contact sales@openalex.org or see [pricing](https://openalex.org/pricing). Returns the ChangefilesListResponse.

tools.name: concepts_get
tools.description: **DEPRECATED:** Use Topics instead. Retrieve a single concept by OpenAlex ID. Required: id. Returns the Concept.

params.name: id
params.description: OpenAlex ID (e.g., C41008148 for Computer Science)

tools.name: concepts_list
tools.description: **DEPRECATED:** Use Topics instead. Get a list of concepts from the legacy taxonomy. Optional: filter, sort, group_by (plus 5 more). Returns the ConceptsListResponse.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter concepts. Examples: `level:0` (top-level), `ancestors.id:C41008148`, `wikidata_id:Q21198` See [all Concept fields](/api-reference/concepts#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort by: `works_count`, `cited_by_count`, `level`. Prefix with `-` for descending. See [all Concept fields](/api-reference/concepts#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: group_by
params.description: Group by: `level` See [all Concept fields](/api-reference/concepts#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.description: Full-text search across titles, abstracts, and other text fields.

params.description: Number of results per page (1-100, default 25)

params.description: Page number for pagination. Use cursor for deep pagination beyond 10,000 results.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor for deep pagination. Use `cursor=*` to start, then use the `next_cursor` from the response.

params.name: sample
params.description: Return a random sample of N results (max 10,000). Cannot be used with sort or page.

params.description: Sort by: `works_count`, `cited_by_count`. Prefix with `-` for descending. See [all Continent fields](/api-reference/continents#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

tools.name: subfields_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single subfield by its ID. Required: id. Returns the Subfield.

params.name: id
params.description: Subfield ID (e.g., 1702 for Artificial Intelligence)

tools.name: subfields_list
tools.description: Get a list of subfields (third-level topic categories). There are 254 subfields spread across 26 fields. Optional: filter, sort, group_by (plus 5 more). Returns the SubfieldsListResponse.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter subfields. Examples: `field.id:17`, `domain.id:3`, `works_count:>100000` See [all Subfield fields](/api-reference/subfields#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort by: `works_count`, `cited_by_count`. Prefix with `-` for descending. See [all Subfield fields](/api-reference/subfields#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: group_by
params.description: Group by: `field.id`, `domain.id` See [all Subfield fields](/api-reference/subfields#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: search
params.description: Full-text search across titles, abstracts, and other text fields.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (1-100, default 25)

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Use cursor for deep pagination beyond 10,000 results.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor for deep pagination. Use `cursor=*` to start, then use the `next_cursor` from the response.

params.name: sample
params.description: Return a random sample of N results (max 10,000). Cannot be used with sort or page.

tools.name: text_classify
tools.description: **DEPRECATED:** This endpoint is deprecated and not recommended for new projects. It will not receive updates or support. Classify arbitrary text to find relevant OpenAlex topics. Costs $0.01 per request. Optional: title, abstract. Returns the TextClassificationResponse.

params.name: title
params.description: Title text to classify

params.name: abstract
params.description: Abstract text to classify

tools.name: topics_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single topic by OpenAlex ID. Required: id. Returns the Topic.

params.name: id
params.description: OpenAlex ID (e.g., T12419)

tools.name: topics_list
tools.description: Get a list of topics with optional filtering, searching, sorting, and pagination. Topics are research areas automatically assigned to works. Optional: filter, sort, group_by (plus 5 more). Returns the TopicsListResponse.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter topics. Examples: `domain.id:1`, `field.id:17`, `subfield.id:1702`, `works_count:>1000` See [all Topic fields](/api-reference/topics#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort by: `works_count`, `cited_by_count`. Prefix with `-` for descending. See [all Topic fields](/api-reference/topics#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: group_by
params.description: Group by: `domain.id`, `field.id`, `subfield.id` See [all Topic fields](/api-reference/topics#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: search
params.description: Full-text search across titles, abstracts, and other text fields.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (1-100, default 25)

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Use cursor for deep pagination beyond 10,000 results.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor for deep pagination. Use `cursor=*` to start, then use the `next_cursor` from the response.

params.name: sample
params.description: Return a random sample of N results (max 10,000). Cannot be used with sort or page.

tools.name: work-types_list
tools.description: Get a list of work types (article, book, dataset, etc.). Optional: filter, sort, search (plus 5 more). Returns the WorkTypesListResponse.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter work types. Examples: `id:article`, `works_count:>1000000`

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort by: `works_count`, `cited_by_count`. Prefix with `-` for descending.

params.name: sample

tools.name: works_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single work by its OpenAlex ID or external ID (DOI, PMID, PMCID, MAG ID). External IDs can be passed as full URLs or URN format (e.g., `doi:10.1234/example` or `pmid:12345678`). Required: id. Returns the Work.

params.name: id
params.description: OpenAlex ID (e.g., W2741809807) or external ID (DOI, PMID, PMCID, MAG)

tools.name: works_list
tools.description: Get a list of scholarly works with optional filtering, searching, sorting, and pagination. Works include journal articles, books, datasets, theses, and more. Optional: filter, sort, group_by (plus 5 more). Returns the WorksListResponse.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter works. Examples: `publication_year:2023`, `type:article`, `open_access.is_oa:true`, `author.id:A5023888391`, `institutions.id:I27837315`, `cited_by_count:>100` See [all Work fields](/api-reference/works#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort by: `cited_by_count`, `publication_date`, `relevance_score` (with search). Prefix with `-` for descending. See [all Work fields](/api-reference/works#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: group_by
params.description: Group by: `publication_year`, `type`, `open_access.is_oa`, `authorships.institutions.country_code` See [all Work fields](/api-reference/works#available-filter-sort-and-group_by-fields).

params.name: search
params.description: Full-text search across titles, abstracts, and other text fields.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (1-100, default 25)

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Use cursor for deep pagination beyond 10,000 results.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor for deep pagination. Use `cursor=*` to start, then use the `next_cursor` from the response.

params.name: sample
params.description: Return a random sample of N results (max 10,000). Cannot be used with sort or page.
